title: Exposing an item document
excerpt:
Hi all, 
Is there a way to expose an item document to non-registered users? 
Thanks

posts.author: TheKribus (Michael Kribus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
Is there a way to expose an item document to non-registered users?

Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yep! You’ll want to go to ‘Share’ at the top right, and click the ‘Share Public Link’ at the bottom.
